justification: The diff correctly migrates JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 (Jupiter) across all test files, replacing @Before/@After with @BeforeEach/@AfterEach and using assertThrows instead of @Test(expected=...). It also adopts Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof (e.g., Turismo.java lines 501-510) and String.formatted() (line 535), and adds @Serial annotations for serialVersionUID fields. The pom.xml and CI workflows are updated to Java 21. No spurious churn is present.
